## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::HandFist;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        HandFist { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
clench, strength, power, unity, solidarity, rebellion, victory, triumph, support, fight, combat, brawl
